## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Why is this change needed?

## How

How was this implemented?

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo test --release` passes
- [ ] `cargo build --release` clean (no warnings)
- [ ] Live scenarios tested against nitro-testnode (if applicable)
- [ ] Simulation campaign run with relevant seeds

## Seed Reproducibility

If this fixes a bug found via simulation, include the seed:

```bash
r30rg --seed <SEED> run <SCENARIO>
```
